series_metadata.series_description: Certificates on active fire wardens giving location of home and date commissioned. Some original records, some copies maintained in Columbus central office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until commission is released, then destroy. a. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain until commission is released, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
